events.name: epidemic
events.description: Regolith dust causes chronic respiratory inflammation.

events.name: cave_discovery
events.description: Underground cavern with stable temperature discovered.

events.name: colonist_conflict
events.description: Accusations of resource hoarding fracture the colony trust.

memories.event: A bitter dispute over food rationing escalates to shouting.
Greenhouse dome seal breach — crops exposed to vacuum.
Earth sends updated colony charter with governance suggestions.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Fine Martian regolith clogs air filters and reduces solar output.
A bitter dispute over food rationing escalates to shouting.
Underground cavern with stable temperature discovered.
Double shadow: Phobos and Deimos transit simultaneously.
Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Ice deposits discovered beneath the eastern ridge.
